## Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run ci` locally and it passed (lint + tests + build).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for any new behavior.
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (`ARCHITECTURE.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`) if conventions changed.
- [ ] I tested in **both light and dark themes** if I changed colors / styles.
- [ ] I tested in a non-default browser (Firefox or Safari) for any feature touching auth, storage, or service workers.
- [ ] PR is **one logical change** — it doesn't bundle unrelated work.
- [ ] Base branch is `dev` (release PRs that target `main` are made by maintainers only).
